title: One trigger may use auxdata belonging to another.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a VARCHAR(255), b INT, c FLOAT, d BLOB);
CREATE TABLE x1(x INT, y INT, z INT, w VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TRIGGER tr1 AFTER INSERT ON t1 FOR EACH ROW INSERT INTO x1 VALUES(NEW.a REGEXP 'abc', NEW.b REGEXP 'abc', NEW.c REGEXP 'abc', NEW.d);
CREATE TRIGGER tr2 AFTER INSERT ON t1 FOR EACH ROW INSERT INTO x1 VALUES(NEW.a REGEXP 'def', NEW.b REGEXP 'def', NEW.c REGEXP 'def', NULL);
key_bug_features: REGEXP operators in triggers using incorrect auxdata
